name: Frozen Ho Ho Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Ice cream (different from the first flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each HoHo cake in half lengthwise.
2. Arrange the halves on the sides and bottom of a 9x13-inch baking pan.
3. Spread one flavor of ice cream over the cakes.
4. Cover with crushed Oreo cookies.
5. Freeze for several hours, or until set.
6. Add the second flavor of ice cream and freeze again.
7. Pour hot fudge sauce evenly over the top.
8. Top with Cool Whip.
9. Garnish with shaved chocolate.
10. Return to the freezer and allow to set completely before serving.
